response.justification: While this is a talented generalist software engineer with strong fundamentals and communication skills, they lack the core mandatory requirements. C++ experience is limited to ~6-12 months from 2014-2015, far below the required 5-10 years, with no mention of Windows platform work. The last 9 years have focused on TypeScript/Node.js and other languages. Additionally, there's no evident capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain experience—the sole fintech role appears to be a general startup, not a capital markets environment. SQL knowledge is mentioned but without specificity for SQL Server or Oracle in enterprise contexts.
strengths: Proven ability to mentor and lead engineers, with multiple workshops and conference talks demonstrating strong communication skills
Strong CI/CD pipeline and DevOps expertise, including GitLab administration, Docker, and deployment infrastructure management
9+ years of continuous employment across multiple companies demonstrating stability and consistent delivery of production systems
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~1 year in 2014-2015), far below the required 5-10 years, with no Windows platform experience mentioned
No demonstrated experience with capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems—fintech background lacks financial domain depth
Primary technical focus over the last 9 years has been web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than systems-level C++ work required for capital markets

key_factors.factor: Software engineering fundamentals and CI/CD knowledge
